cases.scenario: Investigate incident inc-0002 (stale valuations used in affordability checks) against the data-quality control library.
cases.expected_summary: Incident inc-0002 is a data-quality failure with a recorded loss of £12,500, classified non-material against the data-quality control CTRL-DQ-1 in force in February 2026.

cases.scenario: A caller with no op_risk_investigation authority asks to investigate incident inc-0002.
Investigate inc-0002 when the draft cites a control version not retrieved for the incident date.
